meta.purpose: Ultimate safe fallback render template — used when auto-fix is exhausted or renderTree is completely unrecoverable

hero.title: 探索世界
hero.subtitle: 系统正在恢复
hero.description: Always present. Provides minimal world context even in degraded state.

primaryAction.label: 重新探索
primaryAction.description: Always available. Allows user to trigger a system refresh.

content.description: Empty in fallback state. Prevents content rendering errors.

background.description: Neutral background. No animations, no glow effects.
